headline: Vinson & Elkins: Two Good to Be True? The SEC Proposes Optional Semiannual Reporting
summary: By Robert L. Kimball, Katherine Terrell Frank, Alex Bahn, Jon Solorzano, Alexandra M. Lewis, Chloe Schmergel, Josh Rutenberg, Randy Thomas, and Matt Turk On May 5, 2026, the SEC proposed to provide public companies the option of filing interim reports semiannually on new Form 10-S instead of quarterly on Form 10-Q. The proposal would amend Rules 13a-13 […] The post Vinson & Elkins: Two Good to Be True? The SEC Proposes Optional Semiannual Reporting appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: Nvidia vs Palantir: Clash of AI Titans Heats Up
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Palantir (NASDAQ: PLTR) just delivered the cleanest hardware-versus-software split in the AI economy. NVIDIA closed FY2026 with $215.94B in revenue and another Data Center blowout. Palantir followed up with Q1 2026 revenue of $1.633B, up 85% year over year, the fastest growth it has ever reported as a public company. Two ... Nvidia vs Palantir: Clash of AI Titans Heats Up
